commandsRun: Get-FileHash (SHA256) on phase-2-artifact.json, phase-2.json packet, and review capsule
node -e stable-hash recompute: sha256(JSON.stringify(packet minus delegation)+'\n') and sha256(JSON.stringify(capsule)+'\n')
node -e enumerate slugs from src/data/landings.json, occasions.json, neighborhoods.json, menu.json
node -e count menu items and priced items (87/87) across 14 sections in src/data/menu.json
node -e neighborhood anti-doorway floor check (body chars, localFacts, proximityTrustLines, townFaqs, crossLinks) and occasion FAQ/cross-link counts
Get-ChildItem src/pages recursive and dist recursive index.html route enumeration (38 routes)
assumptions: Packet and capsule integrity is defined by the engine's stable-hash (compact JSON.stringify + newline, packet hashed without its delegation block), per packages/plugin/lib/local-site-workflow/delegation.mjs; both recomputed values matched the recorded hashes exactly.

Live-site route parity is verified by independent derivation from src/data files plus the local dist build output (38/38 match); no live-URL crawl was performed, consistent with capsule allowedInputs.
verification: Sealed artifact raw-byte sha256 matches capsule artifactHash 2589da7ca284bde56ee19d9a02d01f5746ef70fb4746ceff2bb7473f8d0c5bb9; artifact not edited.

Route count 38 (within 25-500): 1 home + 1 menu hub + 14 menu sections + 6 occasions + 8 intent landings + 4 info/faq/story + 1 location + 2 neighborhoods + 1 contact; 0 external pages (ordering links held as CTAs).

Parity: 38 routes independently derived from landings.json (13) + occasions.json (6) + neighborhoods.json (2) + menu.json (14 sections) + home/menu-hub/contact (3) match the pageMatrix 1:1; dist/ contains exactly the same 38 index.html routes.

Reserved restaurant roots (menu, contact, occasions, neighborhoods) used only by their own families; no landing slug collision; all 38 paths in trailing-slash form matching astro.config.mjs trailingSlash 'always'.

Depth: 87/87 priced menu items across 14 sections; occasions carry featuredItems + 5-6 FAQs + 5-6 cross-links; both neighborhoods meet anti-doorway floors (2 localFacts, 2 proximityTrustLines, 2 townFaqs, ~955-978 char bodies); SW/Hiawatha/Robins/late-night/halal/vegetarian correctly folded.

copyAdvisories carry all five named Phase 1 findings: Chicago Grill returning-not-new, LJS June 2014, no '#1 on Yelp' claims, Pita Kabab disambiguation-only, review-count 208-vs-192 drift deferred to Phase 4 GBP verification.
Verdict PASS recorded in notes; notes sha256 119fd92c24a1ab16d6bab47bd3c02e27a54014a7a3feae5a532fec5214200c66; nothing touched after hashing.
